Commit:     Vladimir Druzenko <vvd@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-07-20 10:10:48 +0000

    vietnamese/aspell: take maintainership

    This port currently has no maintainer - motivated by personal reasons :-)
    I would like to take maintainership.

    As for what I can see, the current version is still the most recent,
    therefore no additional changes are needed.

    PR:     280380
